---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for OpenHive
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use case
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution
How do you think this should work? (optional)

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered. (optional)

## Additional context
Any mockups, screenshots, or links to similar features in other apps.
